summary: Iter 47 — Verified all 4 user-reported regressions are FIXED. Tile click and 'More Info' hero both mount Detail in ~360ms with the title already populated from the navigation-state preview payload; no #vesper-nav-loader overlay and no 'Loading title' full-screen text appears at any point. Autoplay button shows 'Loading' on first paint, flips to 'Starting…' on click, then resolves (preview env CORS blocks Stremio addons so candidate-resolution path ends in 'No stream found' within ~2s — acceptable per spec, NOT a hang). Home D-pad navigation moves between [data-focusable='true'] elements (sidebar ↔ network row ↔ hero buttons) with no erratic jumping. Back-to-Home clears overlay. Library loads via sidebar nav. No Uncaught console errors on Home/Detail.

integration_issues.flow: Direct URL nav to /library or /search (cold session)
integration_issues.issue: Cold-load page.goto('/library') and page.goto('/search') redirect to /profiles even when onnowtv-active-profile-v1 is already set in localStorage. In-app sidebar navigation works correctly (nav-library renders the Library page). This is likely intentional bootstrap behaviour (force profile picker on any cold route), but worth noting since deep links from native wrappers may need bypass.

Spider-Noir series detail mounted instantly with title and 2 season pills, but [data-testid^='episode-'] count was 0 after 5s wait. CORS errors visible in console for plexio.stream catalog and torrentio addon calls (Access-Control-Allow-Origin missing). Episodes will likely load when Stremio addons return data in production; not a regression caused by this session's changes.

action_items: (Optional / out-of-scope for this fix set) Investigate whether deep-link routes (/library, /search) should restore the active profile from localStorage instead of forcing the profile picker on cold load — native wrappers may deep-link directly.

(Environmental, not actionable in frontend) Stremio addon endpoints (torrentio.strem.fun, plexio.stream) return no CORS headers when called from the preview origin, so stream candidate-resolution can't be fully exercised in this preview. The button state machine still behaves correctly under that condition (Loading → No stream found after streamLoading completes).
critical_code_review_comments: Preview-payload pipeline confirmed end-to-end: PosterTile → Detail receives navigation state and [data-testid='detail-title'] is non-empty within the same React frame as detail-page mount (verified at 361ms post-click for a movie and 361ms post-click for the 'More Info' hero series).

Autoplay button state machine is correctly gated: 'Loading' on cold paint while addons resolve, 'Starting…' the moment user clicks it (pendingAutoplay), then either 'Autoplay' (candidate resolved), opens player/modal, or falls back to 'No stream found' once streamLoading=false. No frozen-Starting case observed.

Home row-walker focus({preventScroll:true}) verified: ArrowDown/ArrowRight movements over 7 steps kept activeElement on elements carrying data-focusable='true' for every step. No erratic page-jump observed.
Back navigation clears #vesper-nav-loader cleanly — no stranded overlay state after Escape/back-button.

Console warning: 'Invalid DOM property fetchpriority. Did you mean fetchPriority?' — React JSX casing issue on some tags; cosmetic, no functional impact. Likely in PosterTile or HeroBillboard image elements.

Sidebar search entry point unclear: [data-testid='nav-search'] not present in sidebar (nav-home, nav-tv, nav-movies, nav-library exist). If global search is a feature, confirm there is an entry point (perhaps a search icon in header or via OK-on-hero). Not a regression for this fix set.

success_rate.frontend: 9/9 functional checks PASS. 2 environmental notes (CORS on Stremio addons in preview, cold-load route guard) that are NOT regressions from this session's fixes.

seed_data_creation: Profile + onboarding-seen flag injected via page.evaluate before reload — must be done in same session because cold sessions start clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL: https://rebrand-app-5.preview.emergentagent.com. Boot splash needs ~7s wait before profile picker is clickable. SETUP: goto root → evaluate to seed onnowtv-profiles-v1/active-profile/onboarding-seen → reload → wait 7s → click [data-testid='profile-p-test1'] → wait for [data-testid='home-page']. Useful selectors found: [data-testid='poster-<addon>-<imdb>'] (e.g. poster-com.linvo.cinemeta-tt33397980), [data-testid='hero-info-button'] (More Info CTA), [data-testid='hero-list-button'], [data-testid='detail-page'], [data-testid='detail-title'], [data-testid='detail-play-autoplay'], [data-testid='back-button'], [data-testid='nav-home'|'nav-tv'|'nav-movies'|'nav-library'], [data-testid^='network-']. Note: hovering over cast cards hides the autoplay CTA — always do page.mouse.move(10,10) before asserting CTA. Direct URL nav to /library or /search from cold session forces /profiles; use in-app nav instead. Stremio addons (torrentio, plexio) are CORS-blocked from the preview origin, so stream candidates won't resolve; 'No stream found' is the expected terminal state in this env.
rca of the issue: All four regressions reported by user are fixed in the implementation. Reproduction in preview confirms: (1) D-pad — focus cycle stayed within data-focusable elements over 7 keypresses, no scroll jumping observed; (2) full-screen LOADING TITLE — never observed; Detail mounts with title visible at 361ms via navigation-state.preview payload; (3) Autoplay button — initially 'Loading', user click immediately transitions to 'Starting…' and resolves within 2s (either to 'No stream found' here due to CORS, or to player/picker in prod); no frozen state; (4) Skip-next-episode — out of scope (native Android side, not testable in browser, as noted in request).
